errorTaxonomy.diagnosticHint: Review the runtime readiness data contract before enabling send.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: Local chat is blocked until runtime readiness evidence exists.

errorTaxonomy.diagnosticHint: A future reviewed asset input boundary must redact local paths.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: Model assets are not configured by this launcher fixture.

errorTaxonomy.diagnosticHint: Use device/session status data only; this fixture does not probe hardware.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: No target device session is active.

errorTaxonomy.diagnosticHint: Runtime execution requires a separate reviewed implementation boundary.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: No local chat runtime is available for assistant responses.

errorTaxonomy.diagnosticHint: A future local session store must define retention and redaction rules.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: Session restore and export are unavailable.

handoffRefs.summary: Base chat/session state is consumed as local data only.
Model display status is consumed as local data only.
Session lifecycle state remains disabled or blocked.
Runtime readiness is consumed as local data only.
Device/session status is consumed as local data only.

limitations: Data-only chat readiness fixture; no readiness check executes runtime code.
No prompts, responses, transcripts, model paths, generated artifacts, private paths, secrets, or tokens are stored.
No KV260 hardware access, serial access, SSH execution, network call, provider call, telemetry, upload, or write-back is performed.
Send controls remain disabled until runtime readiness, model-load, device-session, and local session evidence are available.
This is not a release, tag, versioned compatibility commitment, MCP, LSP, IDE, marketplace, or telemetry implementation.

readinessChecks.label: chat surface fixture
readinessChecks.summary: The checked chat/session fixture can be rendered as local data only.

readinessChecks.displayPolicy: show target label without model paths

readinessChecks.summary: Gemma 3N E4B is selected as a planned target descriptor.

readinessChecks.displayPolicy: show blocked state without filenames or paths
readinessChecks.label: model assets

readinessChecks.label: runtime readiness

readinessChecks.displayPolicy: show inactive state without probing hardware

readinessChecks.displayPolicy: show blocked state without executing runtime code

readinessChecks.summary: No local chat runtime has been implemented or started.

readinessChecks.displayPolicy: show unavailable storage state without reading artifacts

recoveryActions.label: review runtime readiness
recoveryActions.userAction: Review the checked runtime readiness summary.

recoveryActions.label: configure model assets
recoveryActions.launcherAction: Do not read or echo local asset paths.
recoveryActions.userAction: Provide model assets only after a reviewed local input boundary exists.

recoveryActions.label: review device session status
recoveryActions.launcherAction: Render the checked device/session status fixture.
recoveryActions.userAction: Review target status as deterministic local fixture data.

recoveryActions.label: wait for runtime boundary
recoveryActions.launcherAction: Refuse runtime execution from this fixture.
recoveryActions.userAction: Keep send disabled until a runtime boundary is reviewed.

recoveryActions.label: review session store policy
recoveryActions.launcherAction: Do not read, write, or summarize session artifacts.
recoveryActions.userAction: Enable restore or export only after explicit retention rules exist.
